title: Executing a Transport Validation Study
alt: Five steps to design and run a pharma transport validation study

items.label: Map worst-case lanes
items.desc: Validate the toughest route and season; bracket lower-risk lanes.

items.label: Use qualified data loggers
items.desc: Place calibrated loggers at worst-case positions in the load.

items.label: Run sufficient replicates
items.desc: Multiple shipments across seasonal extremes for confidence.

items.label: Challenge the packaging
items.desc: Test shippers for full duration plus a safety margin.

items.label: Define excursion management
items.desc: Pre-agree temperature-time limits and disposition reasoning.
